Tan Xiong иӯҡйӣ„
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Tan Xiong (иӯҡйӣ„). General of Sun Huan. Fights at Yiling, wounds Zhang BaoвҖҷs horse. Tan Xiong was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
